message:
refactor: simplify HashMap alias and extend oracle test fixture support

CPU executor (executor.rs):
- Replace two-line FxHashMap type alias with a single `use ... as HashMap`
  import, eliminating the intermediate type definition
- Switch `HashMap::with_capacity` to `HashMap::with_capacity_and_hasher`
  with `Default::default()` to match the FxHashMap constructor requirements
  under the new alias

Oracle parity tests (linalg_fft_oracle_parity.rs):
- Add TensorF64 and TensorComplex128 oracle value variants to support
  higher-rank tensor fixtures beyond matrices and vectors
- Extract shared complex tensor construction into `complex_tensor_value()`
  helper, deduplicating ComplexVector and TensorComplex128 conversion logic
- Wire new variants into all match arms: oracle_value_to_fj, run_case
  (both multi-output and single-output paths)
- Update module doc comment to remove hard-coded JAX version reference,
  making it fixture-bundle-agnostic

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
